positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for j1_visa_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    has_visa(X0,f1_visa) | has_visa(X0,j1_visa) | ~international_student(X0)).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    f1_visa != j1_visa).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    international_student(mike)).

cnf(u16,negated_conjecture,
    ~has_visa(mike,j1_visa)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define wants_to_work(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define needs_cpt(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define needs_opt(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for j1_visa_negative
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u14,axiom,
    f1_visa != j1_visa).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define wants_to_work(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define needs_cpt(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define international_student(X0) := $true
for all inputs,

for all inputs,
    define needs_opt(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
